caption: A woman with light brown hair tied up in a high ponytail wears black headphones and a black t-shirt while seated in a studio. She is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a stand, glancing slightly to her left with a smile. Behind her is a light-colored wall with a yellow vertical stripe and a dark panel. A monitor is visible in the background displaying the name "Johnson" in red text above a logo, and "Employee Only" is written in smaller white text in the upper corner. To her side, the text "BOSS TALK 101" appears in red and white lettering next to a logo. Another logo featuring the word "PODCAST" is seen on the left. Across the sequence, the woman remains in the same position, maintaining a consistent expression and posture while looking toward someone off-screen.
